name: Aroma Pizza Company Lorton

notes: The live exact-address Toast catalog contains 199 unique standalone products across 16 consumer categories at 7200 Telegraph Square Drive, Lorton, VA 22079.

All 178 frozen rows were reconciled: 163 exact products, seven normalized products, and eight heading or duplicate artifacts. The 170 real rows map one-to-one to 170 current products, and 29 current products were missing.
The corrected catalog restores four Philly Steak Pizza sizes, current sides, two omitted coupons, catering products, and the complete eight-product Drinks section.
Every frozen row was incorrectly assigned to Pizza. The corrected current category order follows Toast and places Drinks last.

No current restaurant-issued allergen guide, allergen matrix, negative allergen claim, or cross-contact disclosure was found after official-domain, social-profile, ordering-page, and targeted-search review.

The configured owner domain is currently compromised and serves unrelated gambling/SEO content. It cannot support menu or allergen claims; the exact-address Toast catalog is restaurant-linked vendor evidence only.

The frozen catalog published 114 official-ingredients rows. Five belonged to section-heading artifacts; all 109 official labels on real products were unsupported and are now unavailable with empty fixed and mayContain fields.
Toast descriptions remain visible as separate Ingredient Intelligence. They are never presented as restaurant-issued allergen evidence, absence claims, or cross-contact assurances.

The frozen generic HTML parser promoted seven section headings plus a duplicate manual Chicken Pizza repair, assigned all products to Pizza, truncated descriptions, omitted 29 current products, and promoted vendor wording to official allergen evidence.
The reproducible audit parser reads 181 stable Toast UUID product links beneath 13 captured sections and unions 18 stable browser-only links: four cheese pizzas, eight drinks, and six coupons.
The current product boundary is enforced at 199 unique Toast UUIDs; headings, featured duplicates, and the duplicate Chicken Pizza repair are excluded, and drinks are placed last.
Focused tests cover the 199-product boundary, all 178 frozen dispositions, provenance-safe allergen semantics, restored omissions, target-only isolation, and two-run idempotence.

sourceAttempts.outcome: HTTP 200 returned 266,123 bytes of unrelated Indonesian gambling and SEO-spam content. The configured restaurant domain is compromised and was rejected as menu or allergen authority.
notes: The raw response is retained and SHA-256 hashed.

sourceAttempts.outcome: The live Toast page identifies Aroma Pizza Company NEW at 7200 Telegraph Sq drive, Lorton, VA and exposes 199 unique current products. Direct archival capture returned HTTP 403; the browser view and a separately labeled readable transport were reconciled.
notes: Toast is restaurant-linked vendor menu evidence and was not promoted to restaurant-issued allergen authority.

sourceAttempts.outcome: The current restaurant Instagram handle was identified through current listings, but the profile could not be fetched by the archival client and exposed no indexed allergen guide or disclosure.

Targeted searches for Aroma Pizza Company Lorton allergens, allergy, ingredients, gluten-free, and cross-contact disclosures returned vendor menus and general listings but no restaurant-issued allergen source.
HTTP 200 produced a 57,444-byte hash-stable readable copy containing 181 unique current Toast product links across 13 sections. It was used only as transport and never as allergen authority.
notes: The 18 live browser-only products are retained in a separate hashed supplement with stable product links.

findings.summary: The configured restaurant owner domain currently serves unrelated gambling and SEO-spam content and cannot support any SafePlate menu or allergen claim.
findings.resolution: Rejected the compromised domain as content authority and used the exact-address restaurant-linked Toast catalog solely for current menu identity.

findings.summary: The frozen extraction promoted seven section headings and a duplicate manual Chicken Pizza repair, assigned all 178 rows to Pizza, and failed to preserve current category boundaries.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 199 unique UUID-backed products across 16 current categories and removed all eight artifacts.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog omitted 29 current products, including four Philly Steak Pizza sizes, sides, coupons, catering products, and all eight drinks.
findings.resolution: Restored all 29 current products into the contracted 199-product catalog.

findings.summary: The frozen output labeled 114 rows official-ingredients even though its own restaurant metadata said no official allergen source existed; 109 of those rows were real products.
findings.resolution: Set all 199 current products to accurately unavailable, cleared fixed and cross-contact fields, and retained menu wording only as separate Ingredient Intelligence.

repairs.summary: Rebuilt Aroma Pizza's current UUID-backed catalog, restored omissions, repaired categories and product boundaries, and removed every unsupported official allergen claim.
